title: Best Indian Films on Netflix Right Now (2025)
description: The definitive guide to Indian cinema on Netflix — ranked by Navras score, not algorithm.
intro: Netflix India has thousands of titles but finding the best is nearly impossible with their algorithm. We've done it for you — every Indian film worth watching on Netflix right now, ranked by Navras score.

entries.blurb: India's most gripping series based on true events.

film.title: IC 814: The Kandahar Hijack
film.verdict: The most tightly written Indian series of 2024.

entries.blurb: India's most celebrated film at Cannes 2024.

film.title: All We Imagine as Light
film.verdict: Grand Prix, Cannes 2024. India's greatest recent triumph at the festival.

entries.blurb: If you haven't seen it, stop everything and watch it now.

film.title: Gangs of Wasseypur
film.verdict: If you haven't seen it, stop everything and watch it now.

entries.blurb: The most poetic Indian film of the last decade.

film.title: Masaan
film.verdict: FIPRESCI Prize and Promising Future Award, Cannes 2015.

entries.blurb: Still the most rewatched film on Netflix India.

film.title: 3 Idiots
film.verdict: Still the most rewatched film on Netflix India.

entries.blurb: The cleverest thriller Bollywood has ever made.

film.title: Andhadhun
film.verdict: The cleverest thriller Bollywood has ever made.

entries.blurb: Watch it tonight with the lights off.

film.title: Tumbbad
film.verdict: Watch it tonight with the lights off.

entries.blurb: The film that introduced Indian mass cinema to the world.

film.title: RRR
film.verdict: The film that made the world fall in love with Indian mass cinema.
